title: More Achievements Mod
description: A mod that adds new achievements to the existing achievements tabs.
body:
# More Achievement Mod

### The mod adds additional achievements to existing ones. 

The mod has been translated into **English** and **Russian**.

**Simple and easy** 

![adv](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b17e20d3488173f9048e6af3161f27aa68006a84.png)

**Enjoy**

❗ Caution ❗

This is the first version of the mod, so there may be errors and inaccuracies.
If you find an error or flaw, please let me know and I will fix it.

![Story page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76813214acbc540709d4b5d279600916b1fd1e6f.png)![Nether page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34b993c541118606e035e6083f26ceca9257c420.png)![End page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6a58ff67caab62246bc8a35b61f723bb6e435d5.png)

https://www.donationalerts.com/r/dashacanthear

![Donate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98ff16e185a2bf585daa14d65acd2faba16dc673.png)
